title: Radio Check
description: Perform a standard radio check with a coast station to verify your radio is working correctly.
task: Perform a radio check on Channel 16 with Anytown Radio.
scriptReference: {{stationName}} {{stationName}} {{stationName}}, THIS IS {{vesselName}} {{vesselName}} {{vesselName}}, RADIO CHECK ON CHANNEL ONE SIX, OVER

scriptedResponses.speaker: COAST_STATION
scriptedResponses.text: BLUE DUCK BLUE DUCK BLUE DUCK, THIS IS ANYTOWN RADIO, READING YOU LOUD AND CLEAR, OVER.

scriptedResponses.speaker: COAST_STATION
scriptedResponses.text: BLUE DUCK, THIS IS ANYTOWN RADIO, ROGER, OUT.

hints: Call the coast station three times by name
Say THIS IS followed by your vessel name three times
State RADIO CHECK and the channel number
End with OVER to invite a response
